title: Ice King Bear Little Ragdoll Cat Stuffed Animal Kitten Plush Toy (Lying)
features: Realistic Design: Every part of its body has been carefully designed.So this stuffed kitten looks wonderfully alive.
Size: 8 Inches Length, close to the size of a real kitten
High Quality Materails: Very soft fur plush.Touchable and huggable.
Use Case: Suit for kids toy, funny party props, early education animals, cute decorations in house.
Gift For Cat lovers: You will like the cute ragdoll kitten stuffed toy, perfect gift for birthday and holiday.
description: Product description Little Ragdoll Cat Stuffed Toy Safety Warning Plastic bags can be dangerous. To avoid danger of suffocation, keep this bag away from babies and children.
